title: Altinn layout sets
description: Schema that describes the different layout sets for an Altinn application and when to use them

validationOnNavigation.title: PageValidation
validationOnNavigation.description: Settings for validation when navigating between pages

page.title: Page
page.description: Which pages should be validated when navigating.

show.$comment: Manually added because the automated script does not dereference this. Do not remove or replace this with a '$ref' without a solution to frontend ref following.
show.title: Validation types
show.description: List of validation types to show

id.title: id
id.description: The layoutset ID. Must be unique within a given application.

dataType.title: dataType
dataType.description: The datatype to use this layoyut.

tasks.description: An array specifying which task to use a layoutset
